summary: Completed testing of iteration 19 features: Pipeline filtering (only PENDING leads in follow-ups), Auto-cleanup on status change, and Remove from Pipeline button. All 12 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified working.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/ health check returns 200 with Sales Dashboard API message
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/kpis follow_ups ONLY contains PENDING status leads (17 leads, all PENDING)
Backend: No non-PENDING leads have follow_up_date set in database
Backend: PUT /api/leads/{id} changing PENDING to SALE auto-clears follow_up_date
Backend: PUT /api/leads/{id} changing PENDING to LOST auto-clears follow_up_date
Backend: POST /api/pipeline/remove-client clears follow_up_date without deleting lead
Backend: POST /api/pipeline/remove-client returns message about required params when empty
Backend: GET /api/tasks returns tasks list for salesperson
Backend: PUT /api/leads/{id} with additional_phones saves correctly
Backend: Admin login returns role=admin
Backend: Admin GET /api/leads returns all leads with salesperson_name field
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/kpis returns all required fields
Frontend: Salesperson login works (Bcardarelli@fshac.com)
Frontend: Dashboard tab loads with Sales Metrics and charts
Frontend: Status tab has 3 sub-views: All Leads, Pipeline (10), Tasks
Frontend: Pipeline view shows 10 cards (reduced from 19 after cleanup)
Frontend: All pipeline cards show PENDING leads only
Frontend: ClientDetailModal shows 'Remove from Pipeline' button
Frontend: PipelineModal (Closing Flow) shows 'Remove from Pipeline' button
Frontend: All Leads view with sorting and status filters works
Frontend: Tasks view shows 'No pending tasks' with 3 completed
Frontend: Earnings tab loads with Payments and SPIFF Breakdown
Frontend: Admin login works (Bsanchezcar@gmail.com)
Frontend: Admin has 4 tabs: Overview, Salespeople, All Data, Email Ingest
Frontend: Admin Overview shows Company Totals and Lead Status pie chart
Frontend: Admin All Data shows leads with INSTALL column (PENDING visible)
critical_code_review_comments: Good: kpi_service.py follow_ups filter correctly checks status == 'PENDING'
Good: leads.py update_lead auto-clears follow_up_date when status changes FROM PENDING
Good: pipeline.py remove-client endpoint clears follow_up_date and removes pipeline_schedules/followup_actions
Good: Database cleanup successful - no non-PENDING leads have follow_up_date
Good: 'Remove from Pipeline' button added to both ClientDetailModal and PipelineModal with proper data-testid attributes
Good: Pipeline count reduced from 19 to 10 cards for Benjamin (only PENDING leads)
seed_data_creation: Test leads created and cleaned up during backend tests (TEST_AUTO_CLEANUP_*, TEST_REMOVE_PIPELINE, TEST_ADDITIONAL_PHONES)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pipeline now only shows PENDING leads. When status changes from PENDING to any other status (SALE, LOST, CREDIT_REJECT, CANCEL_APPOINTMENT), follow_up_date is auto-cleared and pipeline data is removed. 'Remove from Pipeline' button in ClientDetailModal (data-testid='remove-from-pipeline-btn') and PipelineModal (data-testid='pipeline-remove-btn') allows manual removal without status change.
